name: beacon
title: Beacon
description: A price signal beacon for Raycast menu bar alerts
author: ramuyu

commands.name: menu-bar
commands.title: Beacon
commands.description: Watch prices and receive movement alerts

preferences.title: Coins
preferences.name: coins
preferences.description: Symbols to watch; use | to keep later symbols in the dropdown only

preferences.title: Menu Bar Symbols
preferences.name: hideMenuBarSymbols
preferences.label: Hide symbols in menu bar title
preferences.description: Keep symbols visible in the dropdown

preferences.title: Currency Symbol
preferences.name: hideCurrencySymbol
preferences.label: Hide currency symbol
preferences.description: Show prices without $ in the menu bar and dropdown

preferences.name: source
preferences.title: Preferred Source
preferences.description: Use Relay, or prefer one direct exchange and fall back to the other

preferences.name: relayUrl
preferences.title: Relay URL
preferences.description: HTTPS base URL for the Beacon quote relay

preferences.name: relayToken
preferences.title: Relay Token
preferences.description: Bearer token configured on the Beacon quote relay

preferences.title: Alert Rules
preferences.name: alertRules
preferences.description: Looping percent alerts. Format: SYMBOL:PERCENT, for example BTC:1 means alert every 1% move from the last alert price.

preferences.title: Integer Alert Rules
preferences.name: integerAlertRules
preferences.description: Price-level alerts. Format: SYMBOL:STEP, for example BTC:1000 alerts when BTC crosses each $1000 boundary.

preferences.title: Integer Alert Cooldown Minutes
preferences.name: integerAlertCooldownMinutes
preferences.description: Suppress repeated notifications for the same integer boundary per coin and step. Set 0 to disable.

preferences.title: Alert Sound
preferences.name: alertSoundEnabled
preferences.label: Play sound on price alerts
preferences.description: Play a short sound when Beacon shows a price alert HUD and toast
